mapper.sql: e.id, e.user_id, e.employee_no, e.name, e.phone, e.region, e.status, e.hire_date, e.skills, e.certifications, e.create_time
mapper.select: SELECT , u.username FROM engineer e LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON u.id = e.user_id AND u.deleted = 0 WHERE e.id = #{id} AND e.deleted = 0

SELECT id, user_id, employee_no, name, phone, region, status, hire_date, skills, certifications, version, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, deleted FROM engineer WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
